recommendations.description: Merge 4 duplicate rules checking same fields
Fix rules with wrong fields/logical errors (WAF attachment, desync mitigation)
recommendations.impact: HIGH - Ensures rules validate correct compliance requirements

recommendations.description: Fix operator/expected_value type mismatches (in operator with string instead of list)

critical_issues.description: Desync mitigation rule uses 'any' operator but checks Key and Value - Key must match 'desync_mitigation_mode' AND Value must be in list. Should use 'all' operator.
critical_issues.problem: Desync mitigation rule uses 'any' operator but checks Key and Value - Key must match 'desync_mitigation_mode' AND Value must be in list. Should use 'all' operator.
critical_issues.impact: HIGH - Rule may not be checking correct field or has logical error
critical_issues.recommendation: Verify correct field/operator usage in boto3 API response

critical_issues.description: WAF attachment rule checks LoadBalancerName existence, not actual WAF attachment status
critical_issues.problem: WAF attachment rule checks LoadBalancerName existence, not actual WAF attachment status
critical_issues.impact: HIGH - Rule may not be checking correct field or has logical error
critical_issues.recommendation: Verify correct field/operator usage in boto3 API response

type_mismatches.description: Uses 'in' operator but expected_value is not a list (got str)
type_mismatches.problem: Uses 'in' operator but expected_value is not a list (got str)
type_mismatches.fix: expected_value should be a list for 'in' operator

cross_service_analysis.note: Note: All methods used are elb service methods
cross_service_analysis.explanation: All python_methods (describe_load_balancers, describe_load_balancer_attributes) belong to elb service. No cross-service issues found.
cross_service_analysis.recommendation: No action needed - rules correctly use elb API methods

fixes_applied: Updated desync mitigation check to use AdditionalAttributes existence (proxy check)
Added note that Classic ELB doesn't support WAF attachment
Enhanced emit structure to include AccessLog and AdditionalAttributes fields

known_limitations.limitation: Uses AdditionalAttributes existence as proxy. Full validation would require checking Key/Value pairs within the list (Key == 'desync_mitigation_mode' AND Value in allowed list).
known_limitations.impact: Medium - Proxy check may not catch all cases
known_limitations.recommendation: Consider enhancing if engine supports array element filtering

known_limitations.limitation: Classic ELB does not support WAF attachment. Rule only checks for load balancer existence.
known_limitations.impact: High - Rule cannot validate WAF attachment for Classic ELB
known_limitations.recommendation: Consider removing or marking as N/A for Classic ELB. Use elbv2 service for ALB/NLB with WAF support.

test_results.note: Only 4 rules evaluated (others may not have found resources). Failures are expected when Classic ELB resources don't have required configurations. This is correct behavior - failures are compliance failures, not implementation errors.
